subject: Double Colorless Energy, two star symbols on a grey-white energy card background
description: An energy card depicting two black star symbols on a shimmering grey and white metallic or starlight background. The composition is symmetrical — two equal-sized star shapes arranged side by side on an abstract field of soft white and grey radiance. The design is minimal and graphic, entirely symbolic rather than narrative. The palette is grey, white, and black.
foreground: two black star symbols centered on a shimmering silver-grey field
